[<span style="margin-bottom:0" class="image featured"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Python"></span>](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=34991637)
<span style="font-size: 10%;">由 www.python.org - <a rel="nofollow" href="https://www.python.org/community/logos/">Python</a>, <a href="http://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl.html" title="GNU General Public License">GPL</a>, <a href="https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=34991637">Wikipedia</a></span>

<blockquote class="bq_setting">
構築程式的思考重點：
(1) 軟體架構設計：物件導向設計(Object-Oriented)與設計模式(Design Pattern)
(2) 程式組織方式：封裝(Encapsulate)、分離(Separate)與重構(Refactoring)
</blockquote>
